pages.text: 每天晚上,咘咘最喜欢睡前故事时间了！今晚爸爸念完一个故事,咘咘抱着书说:“再来一个！”
pages.text_en: Every night, Bubu loved bedtime story time! Tonight, after Dad finished one story, Bubu held the book and said, "One more!"

pages.text: 爸爸看了看时钟说:“好呀！但是念完这个,咱们就拉钩,今晚就到这里,好不好？”
pages.text_en: Dad looked at the clock. "Okay! But after this one, let's pinky promise — tonight ends here. Deal?"

pages.text: 咘咘使劲点头:“好！”小手指和爸爸的大手指勾在一起,拉钩上吊,一百年不许变！
pages.text_en: Bubu nodded hard. "Deal!" Her little pinky hooked with Dad's big pinky. Pinky promise, hang on tight, don't break it for a hundred years!

pages.text: 爸爸念完了故事。咘咘合上书,又悄悄拿起另一本:“爸爸……我还想看这个……”
pages.text_en: Dad finished the story. Bubu closed the book, then quietly picked up another one. "Dad... I still want to read this one..."

pages.text: 爸爸轻轻摇摇头:“咘咘,我们刚才拉钩了呀。说话要算数哦。”
pages.text_en: Dad gently shook his head. "Bubu, we just made a pinky promise. We have to keep our word."

pages.text: 咘咘噘着嘴,把书放回去。她看着小手指,想起了刚才的拉钩。
pages.text_en: Bubu pouted and put the book back. She looked at her little pinky and remembered the promise.

pages.text: 第二天早上,NOMI来玩。咘咘说:“我们拉钩,只玩一个游戏就去吃早饭,好不好？”
pages.text_en: The next morning, NOMI came to play. Bubu said, "Let's pinky promise — we'll play one game, then go eat breakfast. Deal?"

pages.text: NOMI笑了:“好！”两个小爪子拉在一起,拉钩上吊,一百年不许变！
pages.text_en: NOMI smiled. "Deal!" Their little paws hooked together. Pinky promise, hang on tight, don't break it for a hundred years!

pages.text: 她们玩了积木游戏。咘咘搭了一座好高的塔！NOMI说:“好棒！咱们去吃早饭吧。”
pages.text_en: They played with blocks. Bubu built a very tall tower! NOMI said, "Awesome! Let's go eat breakfast."

pages.text: 咘咘看着积木,又想玩。但是她想起了拉钩——
pages.text_en: Bubu looked at the blocks and wanted to play more. But then she remembered the promise —

pages.text: 咘咘深吸一口气,站起来说:“嗯！我们拉钩了！说话要算数！走,吃早饭去！”
pages.text_en: Bubu took a deep breath, stood up, and said, "Yes! We made a promise! We have to keep our word! Let's go eat!"

pages.text: NOMI开心地拍拍咘咘:“你真棒！说话算数的咘咘最了不起！”
pages.text_en: NOMI happily patted Bubu. "You're amazing! Bubu who keeps her promises is the best!"

pages.text:
那天晚上,咘咘又和爸爸拉钩:念完一个故事就睡觉。这次,咘咘真的做到了！

拉钩的约定,咘咘会守住！说话算数的小兔子,最棒啦！🐰✨
pages.text_en:
That night, Bubu and Dad pinky promised again: one story, then bed. This time, Bubu really did it!

Bubu keeps her pinky promises! A bunny who keeps her word is the best! 🐰✨
